title: Free ATS Resume Checker & Scanner | Pitch My CV
description: Use our free ATS resume checker to see if your CV passes applicant tracking systems. Find missing keywords and formatting errors instantly.
text_content: Free ATS Resume Checker & Scanner | Pitch My CV Free ATS Resume Checker Over 75% of resumes are rejected by Applicant Tracking Systems before a human ever sees them. Upload your resume below to check your ATS score instantly. Upload your resume Click or drag and drop here PDF, DOCX (Max 5MB) Check ATS Score Free How our ATS checker works Our scanner mimics the exact logic used by enterprise hiring software like Taleo, Greenhouse, and Workday. 1. Formatting Parse Test We attempt to extract your text. If you use columns, tables, or complex designs, we'll flag exactly where the parser fails to read your experience. 2. Keyword Density Scan We compare the vocabulary in your document against standard industry requirements to find missing hard skills and buzzwords. 3. Action Verb Analysis We detect weak, passive language (e.g., "responsible for") and suggest strong, metric-driven verbs that algorithms score highly. Related resume guides Use these practical resources to improve score, clarity, and recruiter relevance. ATS Resume Checklist Top ATS Resume Mistakes Resume Keyword Optimization Guide Role-based Resume Examples
